name: add_terraform_aws_module
brief_template:
To add a Terraform AWS module:
1. Create modules/<name>/ with main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf
2. Define provider aws block in root main.tf
3. Add backend config (S3 + DynamoDB for state locking)
4. Use module in root: module 'vpc' { source = './modules/vpc' ... }
5. Run 'terraform init && terraform plan'
6. Add .gitignore for .terraform/, *.tfstate, *.tfvars
